name: bugs
description: Standalone bug-log plugin. When a BUGS.md exists at the project root, it notes at session start that the project keeps a bug log and instructs the agent to record any bug found-but-not-fixed (deferred or out of scope) there, and gives a non-blocking reminder of the same before wrapping up. It does not load the file's contents — the agent reads BUGS.md on demand. Ships the bugs skill that adds, updates, and resolves entries, removing each when fixed. Activates only once a BUGS.md exists — enable or disable independently of the other workflows.

interface.longDescription: When a BUGS.md exists at the project root, notes at session start that the project keeps a bug log and instructs the agent to record any bug found-but-not-fixed (deferred or out of scope) there, and gives a non-blocking reminder of the same before wrapping up. It does not load the file's contents — the agent reads BUGS.md on demand when it needs the open list. Ships the bugs skill that adds, updates, and resolves entries in BUGS.md, removing each one when it is fixed so the log stays current rather than growing forever. Standalone — enable or disable independently of the other workflows.
